summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of Ads Gupta AI advertising platform landing page. Tested all major sections, animations, interactions, responsive design, and external link functionality. All core features are working correctly with only one minor data-testid inconsistency found.

design_issues.issue: data-testid inconsistency: 'mobile-nav-ai tool' (with space) instead of 'mobile-nav-ai-tool' (with hyphen)
design_issues.impact: Testing automation issue only - functionality works correctly

passed_tests: Hero section renders with kinetic typography 'ADVERTISING AT THE SPEED OF THOUGHT.'
3D geometric animation displays and animates correctly with SVG wireframe
Desktop navigation shows logo 'ADSGUPTA', AI Tool, Ad-Blog, Network links, Try Demo button
Hub section displays 2 glassmorphic cards with correct links (demoai.adsgupta.com, blog.adsgupta.com)
External links correctly open in new tab (target='_blank')
Features section shows 6 neumorphic cards with proper styling
Blog Preview section 'THE AD-ARCHIVES' displays 3 blog cards with correct titles
Stats ticker shows network stats with marquee animation (12 stat items found)
Footer newsletter signup form functional with success message
Custom cursor visible and properly configured for hover interactions
Mobile navigation bar displays at bottom with correct links
Mobile responsive design working correctly across all sections
All interactive elements properly clickable and accessible
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix minor data-testid inconsistency in MobileNav.jsx: change 'mobile-nav-ai tool' to 'mobile-nav-ai-tool' for better test automation consistency
success_percentage: frontend: 98% (1 minor issue out of 17+ tested features)
